description: A microbiologist must review environmental monitoring data from a sterile manufacturing area to ensure it remains in a state of control.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest environmental monitoring results (air and surface samples) for the Grade A cleanroom.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls the data from the LIMS.

nodes.task_description: Compare the results against the established alert and action limits.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds that one surface sample result is above the action limit.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a quality investigation for the out-of-limit result.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a new investigation record in the quality system.

nodes.task_description: Recommend corrective actions, such as enhanced cleaning of the area.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent adds a recommendation to the investigation for a triple-clean of the affected area.
